'''lathada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zahid|zahid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-th-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zahid|zahid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| lathada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:læthædæth|læthædæth]] || [[word:læthædæj|læthædæj]] || [[word:læthædæsh|læthædæsh]] || [[word:læthædæ|læthædæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lathathadath|lathathadath]] || [[word:lathathadaj|lathathadaj]] || [[word:lathathadash|lathathadash]] || [[word:lathathada|lathathada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lathadath|lathadath]] || [[word:lathadaj|lathadaj]] || [[word:lathadash|lathadash]] || [[word:lathada|lathada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lathafdath|lathafdath]] || [[word:lathafdaj|lathafdaj]] || [[word:lathafdash|lathafdash]] || [[word:lathafdaf|lathafdaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lathadatha|lathadatha]] || [[word:lathadaja|lathadaja]] || [[word:lathadasha|lathadasha]] || [[word:lathadaka|lathadaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lathadath|lathadath]] || [[word:lathadaj|lathadaj]] || [[word:lathadash|lathadash]] || [[word:lathada|lathada]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lathadathal|lathadathal]] || [[word:lathadajal|lathadajal]] || [[word:lathadashal|lathadashal]] || [[word:lathadakal|lathadakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lathadathatha|lathadathatha]] || [[word:lathadajaja|lathadajaja]] || [[word:lathadashasha|lathadashasha]] || [[word:lathadaka|lathadaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lathadathan|lathadathan]] || [[word:lathadajan|lathadajan]] || [[word:lathadashan|lathadashan]] || [[word:lathadakan|lathadakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lathadathaoro|lathadathaoro]] || [[word:lathadajaoro|lathadajaoro]] || [[word:lathadashaoro|lathadashaoro]] || [[word:lathadakaoro|lathadakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
